meta.title: LiteGen — One API for every AI image & video model
meta.description: LiteGen is an open-source, OpenAI-compatible proxy for AI image and video generation. Route across OpenAI, Stability, Replicate, Google, Fal, Runway, and Luma with automatic fallback, load balancing, caching, and cost tracking.

hero.title: One API for every AI image & video model
hero.subtitle: LiteGen is the universal proxy for AI image and video generation. Like LiteLLM, but for multimedia — route across every major provider with automatic fallback, load balancing, caching, and cost tracking.
hero.codeCaption: OpenAI-compatible — point your existing client at LiteGen.

howItWorks.heading: One prompt. Every image & video model.
howItWorks.subheading: Send a single OpenAI-style request. LiteGen fans it out to whichever model you want — DALL·E, FLUX, Imagen, Veo, Ray — falls back when one is down, and streams the finished image or video straight back. Hover a model to light up its route.
howItWorks.hint: Hover a model to light up its route
howItWorks.figcaption: Diagram: one OpenAI-style prompt enters the LiteGen gateway, which applies routing, fallback, caching, per-model schemas, key management, and webhooks, then dispatches to image models (OpenAI DALL·E 3, Stability SDXL, Replicate FLUX) and video models (Runway Gen-4, Luma Ray 2) and streams the generated media back.

features.heading: Everything you need to ship generation at scale
features.subheading: A single, self-hosted gateway in front of every provider.

unified.title: Unified API
unified.desc: OpenAI-compatible REST endpoints for image & video across every provider.

routing.title: Smart routing
routing.desc: Fallback chains, weighted round-robin, lowest-cost and lowest-latency strategies.

caching.title: Caching
caching.desc: In-memory cache with configurable TTL to skip duplicate generations.

cost.title: Cost tracking
cost.desc: Per-request cost estimation and aggregate spend analytics.

keys.title: API key management
keys.desc: Create and revoke keys, with weighted key pools and per-key quotas.

observability.title: Observability
observability.desc: Request logging, Prometheus metrics, and structured tracing built in.

dashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
dashboard.desc: Monitor providers, requests, and spend from a React dashboard.

selfhosted.title: Self-hosted
selfhosted.desc: A single binary or Docker, backed by SQLite or Postgres.

providers.heading: Works with the providers you already use
providers.subheading: 18 image & video providers and counting — swap or combine them without touching your code.

quickstart.heading: Up and running in minutes
quickstart.subheading: Point your existing OpenAI-style client at LiteGen and start generating.

sdks.heading: First-party SDKs
sdks.subheading: Typed clients for TypeScript and Python — install, point at your gateway, and generate.

reference.title: Reference
reference.modelsSub: Every model LiteGen integrates and exactly what each one accepts — generated from the capability registry that powers the gateway.
reference.restSub: The complete HTTP contract, generated from the OpenAPI spec — for calling LiteGen directly without an SDK.

footer.tagline: The universal proxy for AI image & video generation.
